name: Universal Composite Restorative - Shade A2
description: Premium nano-hybrid composite restorative material featuring exceptional handling characteristics and high polishability. Low polymerization shrinkage ensures excellent marginal integrity. Ideal for anterior and posterior restorations with natural aesthetics.

name: ProGutta Percha Points - Size 25mm
shortDescription: Tapered gutta percha for root canal filling.
description: High-quality gutta percha points with standardized taper for consistent root canal obturation. Excellent radiopacity and easy handling. Compatible with all major nickel-titanium rotary systems.

name: Surgical Aspirator Tips - Sterile
description: High-volume surgical aspirator tips made from medical-grade polymer. Sterile single-use design ensures maximum infection control. Flexible yet rigid construction provides optimal suction control during surgical procedures.
